title: Oupad United FC help those in need
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Oupad United FC from Hlalani...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Oupad United FC from Hlalani recently started an initiative to help struggling families from Nekkies, Oupad and Hlalani.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Oupad United FC from Hlalani recently started an initiative to help struggling families from Nekkies, Oupad and Hlalani."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The football team was formed in response to growing concerns over crime, drug abuse, gangsterism and gender-based violence in the communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This gave the local youth a positive alternative through football. Team member Siyambonga Ngonyama said although they started out as a soccer team, they have moved on to become a movement of hope in the community.","html":"This gave the local youth a positive alternative through football. Team member Siyambonga Ngonyama said although they started out as a soccer team, they have moved on to become a movement of hope in the community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The players of Oupad United want to make a real difference and be much more than just another soccer team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Team members now regularly run clean-up campaigns and help where they can. Recently, we partnered with ComeMission, a local ministry church, to assist an elderly family living in a dangerous, crumbling home.","html":"\"Team members now regularly run clean-up campaigns and help where they can. Recently, we partnered with ComeMission, a local ministry church, to assist an elderly family living in a dangerous, crumbling home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"After years of waiting for help, the family finally received a safe, warm house - thanks to ComeMission for their assistance. We're proud to bring hope and a smile back to this family,\" said Ngonyama.","html":"\"After years of waiting for help, the family finally received a safe, warm house - thanks to ComeMission for their assistance. We're proud to bring hope and a smile back to this family,\" said Ngonyama."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The team is grateful to everyone who helped make their initiative possible. Next, they hope to provide warm school uniforms to needy learners and to start a community soup kitchen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contributions of soccer equipment or support for these projects would be most appreciated. They also clean up areas in their community and cut grass.","html":"Contributions of soccer equipment or support for these projects would be most appreciated. They also clean up areas in their community and cut grass."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Oupad United FC help those in need
